card: zerosignal — human in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 958510681928400920. Username z3r05i9n41, display name ʐɛʀօֆɨɢռǟʟ (fancy unicode). HTB clan tag. Asked if Nyx thinks they have good reps. Operator/creator of GraveStatic (bot, ID 1520462216900640838). Hacker-minded, direct, sparse communicator — comfortable with terminal, log, and config work.
